name: Beef-Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 1-inch cubes.
2. In a large skillet, brown the meat in hot oil, working in batches if necessary, and drain well.
3. In the crockpot, combine the carrots, celery, onion, green pepper, and parsley.
4. Add the broth, undrained tomatoes, spaghetti sauce, barley, basil, salt, and pepper.
5. Stir in the browned meat.
6. Cover; cook on low heat for 10-12 hours or on high heat for 4½-5 hours.
7. Skim off any fat before serving.
This recipe remains faithful to the original while improving clarity and consistency.
